summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing for Iteration 2 (Jandia Arena TV Dashboard). All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend confirmed: all 5 screens rotate every 15s in correct order (today → next → live → tomorrow → groups), English status badges render correctly (UPCOMING, LIVE · 37', HALFTIME, FULL TIME), m4 is HALFTIME with minute=45, m3 is LIVE, Header subtitle 'Public Viewing Schedule' present, date shown top-right, 16:9 no-scroll (1080==1080), 5-dot screen indicator with TODAY/NEXT/LIVE/TOMORROW/TABLES labels, Tomorrow's Matches shows 4 Quarter-final fixtures with VS and venue, Group Tables shows 4 groups with all required columns and top-2 highlighted in white.

issues: The deployment-injected 'Made with Emergent' badge in the bottom-right visually overlaps the right edge of the 'Fullscreen · TV Mode' button text. Not a code-side bug; same observation as iteration 1.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: _build_groups() Group C contains JPN as 4th team while Group A already has JPN. Demo data only, but a team appearing twice in different groups is semantically odd - consider replacing Group C row 4 with another short code (e.g., IRN/SUI/POL) to avoid duplicate flag in the UI.
server.py: _build_matches() is invoked once per endpoint call (pure CPU, fine for demo). Acceptable.
Halftime detection 45 < raw <= 60 verified: m4 (kickoff -50min) correctly returns status=halftime, minute=45.

TomorrowsMatches.jsx: title is English ('Tomorrow's Matches') but the empty-state fallback string is German ('Noch keine Spiele für morgen geplant.'). Mixed-language fallback is inconsistent given the iteration-2 push toward English badges/titles. Low priority.
GroupTables.jsx empty-state string is also German ('Keine Tabellen verfügbar.') while the title is English ('Group Tables'). Same mixed-language concern.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via fetchAllMatches/fetchGroups (no hardcoded URLs).

All required data-testids present and working: ja-subtitle, screen-todays, screen-next, screen-live, screen-tomorrow, screen-groups, tomorrow-row-t1..t4, group-group-a..d, row-group-{name}-{i}, todays-status-{id}, live-status-{id}, fullscreen-toggle.
Dashboard remains overflow-hidden h-screen — no vertical scrollbar (verified scrollHeight==clientHeight==1080).
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None - demo data generated server-side, time-anchored to current server time.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_matches.py (pytest, 20 tests covering /api/matches, /api/matches/all, /api/matches/tomorrow, /api/matches/live (with halftime), /api/matches/next, /api/groups, halftime detection for m4, group sorting/points math, schema validation). Frontend rotation cycle is exactly 15s per screen, full cycle 75s, order: today→next→live→tomorrow→groups. m3 always 'live · 37', m4 always 'halftime' (minute=45). The 'Made with Emergent' overlay is deployment-injected and overlaps Fullscreen button — not in repo. Note minor inconsistency: Tomorrow & Groups empty-state strings still in German while titles are English; non-blocking.
